description: A customer enrolled in a community solar program is calling to understand the credits on their bill.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's bill and identify the community solar credit line item.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the credit on the bill statement.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the generation data from the community solar farm for the billing period and the customer's subscription share.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the MWh generated by the customer's share of the farm.

nodes.task_description: Explain how the bill credit was calculated based on the solar generation and the credit rate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly walks the customer through the calculation, resolving their confusion.
